International Property Awards
Celebrating excellence in the property industry

The International Property Awards identify the highest levels of achievement in real estate, development, architecture, interior design and marketing in both the residential and commercial sectors, focusing on services, sustainability, high living standards, ergonomics, originality and creativity.

DISCOVER MORE

INTERNATIONAL PROPERTY AWARDS

CELEBRATING EXCELLENCE IN THE PROPERTY INDUSTRY

TICKETS AVAILABLE NOW!

THE ASIA PACIFIC PROPERTY AWARDS 2026

PHOTOGRAPHY AVAILABLE NOW!

THE INTERNATIONAL PROPERTY AWARDS & IPAX 2025

PHOTOGRAPHY AVAILABLE NOW!

THE PROPERTY AWARDS EVENT PHOTOGRAPHY

Architecture / Interior Design / Development / Real Estate

 

See industry professionals talk about how winning an International Property Award has impacted their businesses →
Previous Award Winners
Celebrating the highest levels of achievement

The International Property Awards are open to residential and commercial property professionals from around the globe. They celebrate the highest levels of achievement by companies operating in all sectors of the property and real estate industry. An International Property Award is a world-renowned mark of excellence.

WHAT ARE THE INTERNATIONAL PROPERTY AWARDS?

HOW TO ENTER THE AWARDS

Entering The Awards Online
“I thought the panel session was really interesting thanks to the great questions you prepared and the way you moderated the session. You certainly made the awards ceremony very entertaining – it was like being at the BAFTAs!”
– Frank McGoldrick

SEE MORE TESTIMONIALS

Award Deadlines

The International Property Awards are split into regions and are judged annually.

Participants enter at their relevant national level and are judged by a highly experienced team of professionals who cover the whole range of property disciplines.
Companies selected as winners are then invited to attend a glittering awards dinner for each region and have the right to use the prestigious logo in their marketing.

LEARN MORE ABOUT THE ENTRY PROCESS

ABOUT THE
International Property Awards

The awards celebrate the highest levels of achievement by companies operating in all sectors of the property & real estate industry. An International Property Award is a world-renowned mark of excellence.

Celebrating the Highest Levels of Achievement

The International Property Awards are open to residential and commercial property professionals from around the globe. They celebrate the highest levels of achievement by companies operating in all sectors of the property and real estate industry. An International Property Award is a world-renowned mark of excellence.

The awards are split into regions covering Africa, Asia Pacific, Arabia, Canada, Caribbean, Central & South America, Europe, UK and USA. Participants enter at their relevant national level and are judged by a highly experienced team of professionals who cover the whole range of property disciplines.

HOW TO ENTER

Glittering Awards Dinner

Companies selected as winners are then invited to attend a glittering awards dinner for each region and have the right to use the prestigious logo in their marketing.

The highest-scoring winners from each region are automatically entered into the overall International Awards, which ultimately determine the world’s finest property companies.

ENTER THE AWARDS

VIEW PAST WINNERS

Winners’ Endorsements

Listen to industry professionals talk proudly about their projects and what winning an International Property Award has helped them to achieve.

VIEW TESTIMONIALS & ENDORSEMENTS

Holborn

Best International Hotel Architecture

There are many benefits to sponsoring a regional award, these include:

VIEW ALL BENEFITS OF SPONSORSHIP

Global Media Coverage

Higher Awareness

Endorsement & Award Logos

History of the awards
The Early Years

The inaugural International Property Awards were presented in 1993 and covered 10 different residential categories. Award winners gave favourable reports and feedback, noting a number of benefits ranging from increased profile and positive customer response to increased coverage from local and national press and improved staff morale.

We held our first gala event at the Park Lane Hotel in London, with most of the winners attending to collect their awards. The pre-dinner reception provided winners with a chance to network with other companies and many worthwhile business relationships stemmed from that first gathering.

In 1998 we held our gala event at the House of Commons – a very popular choice of venue amongst winners. As the reputation of the awards grew, attracting more publicity and entrants from a wider range of countries, so did the demands on space. Consequently, we moved the gala evenings to the Marriott Grosvenor Square, now the Royal Lancaster Hotel.

By this time the International Property Awards were established as the premier programme recognising and rewarding excellence in their field and the gala dinners had become essential dates on the property industry calendar.

Company Growth
Sponsorship
Organiser’s Statement

Decisions on award winners are given by an expert panel of independent judges.
Sponsorship or the judges’ opinions does not imply endorsement of any of the individual award winners by the sponsors or the judges. The judges are selected by the International Property Awards organisers for their expertise in a variety of disciplines relating to the design, development and marketing of property.

The awards are given for the quality of design, construction and presentation of individual properties and property developments, interiors, architecture and marketing. The awards are not an endorsement from any sponsor or judge but are a recognition of achievement in a particular category or discipline by an expert judging panel.

The sponsors and judges take no responsibility for the activities of any award winner. As with any property purchase, if you are buying a property with or without any connection to these awards, it is imperative that you seek independent legal advice before entering into any commitment.

Information recorded by the judges on score sheets is stored for three months after the final gala presentation in each award year; it is destroyed thereafter.

Our Judging Panel

The panel of judges for the International Property Awards is large and include judges from a variety of backgrounds and expertise. We have over 100 judges, divided up reviewing entries in all award categories. Each judge is allocated entries which match their areas of expertise.

HOW WE JUDGE THE
International Property Awards

Our extensive panel of independent judges lend their expertise and experience to assessing thousands of entries each year.

Our Judging Panel

The panel of judges for the International Property Awards is large and include judges from a variety of backgrounds and expertise. We have over 100 judges, divided up reviewing entries in all award categories. Each judge is allocated entries which match their areas of expertise.

FAWAZ ALHARBI

LEARN MORE ABOUT THE JUDGING PANEL
A Statement From The Chairmen

We, the Joint Chairmen of the Judging Panel for the International Property Awards, write to assure you of the credentials of IPA.

Our role is to ensure the fairness and probity of the organisation’s arrangements for judging entries for international awards. We attend judging sessions and present awards at ceremonies around the world.

The panel of judges comprises leading figures from all aspects of the property industry who give freely of their time and professionalism. We are confident in their sound judgement and know that all awards are well deserved.

Please be assured that this enterprise is well ordered and properly administered.
We commend the work of IPA to you.

Lord Best

The Earl of Lytton

Lord Waverley

Lord Thurso

The award & judging process

To enter the awards is easy, first step is to register using our online form.

Then it’s a matter of completing and returning your entry packs, with your personal advisor on hand to help you at every step of the way.

The awards entry process
Register

The easiest way to get started is to register online, alternatively download an entry form here. Pick your categories and entry types.

Awards advisor & entry packs

An award advisor will be assigned to you, and will be on hand to guide you through the entry process.

Complete your individual entry packs

The entry pack contains details about the criteria and marking process for that category, as well as detailed rules and guidelines for your entry.

Awards advisor & entry packs

Your entry will be judged against every criteria point for that category and given a rating.

Award results – congratulations!

Your awards advisor inform you if your entry has won an award or not. All winners receive a high-quality promotional items.

Awards announcement
– gala event

A gala event is held, where attendees enjoy a champagne reception and gala dinner, with the awards announcements.

International judging

At the end of the awards year, all regional nominees will have their entries re-judged, who will decide the International winners.

Awards Grand Final
– gala event

A Grand Final gala event is hosted, where attendees enjoy a champagne reception and gala dinner, with the awards announcements.

INTERNATIONAL PROPERTY AWARDS:
Winners Books

Successful companies in the International Property Awards are listed in a yearly World’s Best book for their region. Winners can choose to have editorial pages, showcasing their success to readers and promoting their company to a prestigious audience of engaged readers.

This prestigious book is distributed to first and business travellers of Emirates and over 50 other airlines, through the Awards’ partnership with International Property & Travel magazine. This is combined with an extensive digital readership – free to access and reaching a global audience through subscribers, social media, mail-outs, newsletters and wide-ranging marketing by both the International Property Awards and the winners themselves.

Terms and Conditions

International Property Media makes no assurances or guarantees of quality, safety, legality, adherence to building regulations, or to other regulations and requirements with regard to individuals, companies or projects entering in, winning or associated with the International Property Awards and its subsidiaries. International Property Media advises that all purchases, contracts or agreements should be subject to full due diligence on the part of the buyer, contractor or contractee and should never be made based on the existence of an Award or association with the International Property Awards alone. International Property Media bears no responsibility for injury or damages (financial, legal or otherwise) resulting from any action or decision taken in relation to the Awards.

All ticket purchases are non-refundable.

Transactions are made in British Pound Sterling (GBP).

Force Majeure: Should the Event be delayed or cancelled as a result of circumstances beyond our reasonable control the following terms will apply:

(i) If the Event is rearranged within 8 weeks of the date of the delayed or cancelled Event your advance payments will be retained and applied to the rearranged Event at a similar or same quality venue.Whilst you will not be required to pay any increases to the ticket price, we will not be liable for any additional or consequential loss or expenditure caused by or relating to such delay or cancellation. Accordingly, you should obtain insurance against such loss or expenditure.

(ii) If the Event is not rearranged within 8 weeks of the date of the delayed or cancelled Event you will be entitled to a full refund of all advance payments that you have made, but we will not be liable for any additional or consequential loss or expenditure caused by or relating to such delay or cancellation. Accordingly, you should obtain insurance against such loss or expenditure.

Photography & Media Consent

By attending any event organized by the International Property Awards, you acknowledge and accept that photography and videography may be conducted throughout the event.

Unless expressly stated otherwise in writing prior to the event, you grant the International Property Awards and its affiliates the unrestricted, royalty-free right to capture, use, reproduce, and publish any photographs or video footage taken during the event that may include your likeness, image, or participation. This content may be used for promotional, editorial, and marketing purposes, including but not limited to websites, social media, printed materials, press coverage, and advertising campaigns.

If you do not wish to be photographed or filmed, you must inform the event organizers in writing before the event date. We will make reasonable efforts to respect such requests.

The International Property Awards will not use any image in a defamatory, misleading, or intentionally harmful manner.
